summary: Testing iteration 8: Document Studio AI Agents and Build Page overhaul. All features working correctly. Backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed). Frontend: 100% - all new features verified.
passed_tests: ✅ Document Studio - All 6 AI Agents visible and clickable (General, Lawyer, Accountant, HR, Marketing, Academic)
✅ Document Studio - Chat header updates to show selected agent name and description
✅ Document Studio - Tabs work correctly (Agents/Type/Files)
✅ Document Studio - AI Lawyer agent generates NDA with proper legal language
✅ Document Studio - AI Accountant agent generates invoice with financial details
✅ Document Studio - Generated files appear in Files tab with Download button
✅ Document Studio - Export button visible in preview area
✅ Build Page - View mode toggle (Preview/Code/Split) all working
✅ Build Page - Code view shows HTML editor textarea with content
✅ Build Page - Split view shows both code editor and preview side by side
✅ Build Page - Preview view shows rendered website in iframe
✅ Build Page - File tabs (index.html tab visible, + button to add files)
✅ Build Page - AI chat generates website code and updates preview
✅ Build Page - Download and Save buttons visible and functional
✅ Backend /api/document/generate accepts 'agent' parameter correctly
✅ Backend /api/document/generate with lawyer agent returns legal content
✅ Backend /api/document/generate with accountant agent returns financial content
✅ Backend /api/document/generate with hr agent returns HR content
✅ Backend /api/document/generate with marketing agent returns marketing content
✅ Backend /api/document/generate with academic agent returns academic content
✅ Backend /api/build/generate returns code for website modifications
critical_code_review_comments: Document Studio AI Agents implementation is well-structured with 6 domain-specific agents (lines 833-840 App.js)
Agent prompts in backend (lines 1007-1030 server.py) provide good domain expertise for each agent type
Build Page view mode toggle implementation is clean with proper state management (viewMode state)
Code editor uses data-testid='code-editor' for testability
File tabs implementation allows adding new files dynamically
seed_data_creation: Test documents generated: NDA (lawyer), Invoice (accountant), Job description (hr), Product announcement (marketing), Research abstract (academic)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 tested Document Studio AI Agents (6 agents: general, lawyer, accountant, hr, marketing, academic) and Build Page overhaul (Preview/Code/Split views, file tabs, code editor). All features working correctly. Previous iteration 7 confirmed chat formatting, sidebar collapse, image retry all working.
